HomePage.title: A calm starting point for bilingual nutrition tracking.
HomePage.description: This foundation sets up English and Hebrew routes, direction-aware layout, and a small public shell for future reviewable feature work.

status.title: Foundation only
status.body: Search, diary, accounts, barcode scanning, recipes, targets, and food databases are intentionally not implemented yet.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Use email and password access for this foundation account flow.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.description: Create a foundation account with email and password.

status.ready: This form uses Supabase auth when local environment values are configured. Profile and target setup screens are still deferred.
status.checkEmail: Check your email to finish creating the account. The confirmation callback route is not implemented yet.

errors.authFailed: We could not complete that auth request. Check the details and try again.
errors.missingConfig: Supabase environment values are missing on this machine.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

today.label: Today workspace
today.title: Your protected nutrition space is ready for the next layer.
today.description: This signed-in area confirms account access and session handling. Food logging, targets, diary history, and dashboard calculations are intentionally not implemented yet.
today.placeholderBody: Future reviewable work can add profile, targets, diary, and nutrition views here after database schema and RLS decisions are approved.
